_comment: Protocol Singularity - LLM API credentials. Multiple OpenAI-compatible providers can be listed in 'providers' and will be tried in order (fallback on 402/429/5xx). The flat apiKey/endpoint/model fields are kept for backward compatibility and treated as the final fallback provider.

providers._comment: Optional: OpenRouter gives you access to many models via a single key. Remove or fill as needed.
providers.name: openrouter

providers._comment: Optional: direct OpenAI. Remove if unused.
providers.name: openai

_legacy_comment: Legacy single-provider fields (used if 'providers' is empty/missing).
